column1: Mr. Kumapayi is a highly accomplished and result-driven professional with over twenty (20) years of progressive banking experience
spanning across Finance, Strategy, Risk Management, and Treasury.
column2: He joined Access Bank in 2002 as the Head of Financial Control

column1: and Credit Risk Management. Prior to joining Access Bank, he held controller and analyst positions in First City Monument Bank
Limited and Guaranty Trust Bank Plc, respectively.
